properties.ScialMedia: FB: Rapid Ohia Death; Instagram: ohialife
properties.Mission: The Mission of the Rapid ʻŌhia Death Project is to perform research on the topic of Rapid ʻŌhia Death. We have teams that work with the scientists to relay important messages out to the public. Public awareness on the issue has been on the rise and we will continue to spread awareness.
properties.Metrics: We keep spreadsheets of all events, people reached, demographics, etc. for record keeping purposes
properties.Goals: We would like to spread awareness on Rapid Ohia Death across the state
